SEARCH
Package com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.builder

Class ItemBuilder

java.lang.Object
com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.builder.ItemBuilder
Direct Known Subclasses:
BlockDataItemBuilder, PotionItemBuilder
public class ItemBuilder extends Object
Builder to easily create ItemStacks

Create a new builder, manipulate it's meta, and finish off using build() to get your ItemStack

  • Constructor Details

    • ItemBuilder

      public ItemBuilder(@NotNull @NotNull Material material)
      Start a new ItemBuilder

      Amount will default to 1

      Parameters:
      material - Material for this new item

    • ItemBuilder

      public ItemBuilder(@NotNull @NotNull Material material, int amount)
      Start a new ItemBuilder
      Parameters:
      material - Material for this new item
      amount - Amount for this item

    • ItemBuilder

      public ItemBuilder(@NotNull @NotNull Material material, @NotNull @NotNull Consumer<ItemMeta> meta)
      Start a new ItemBuilder

      You can use the consumer to quickly manipulate the item meta if you choose

      Parameters:
      material - Material for this new item
      meta - Consumer to manipulate meta

    • ItemBuilder

      public ItemBuilder(@NotNull @NotNull Material material, int amount, @NotNull @NotNull Consumer<ItemMeta> meta)
      Start a new ItemBuilder

      You can use the consumer to quickly manipulate the item meta if you choose

      Parameters:
      material - Material for this new item
      amount - Amount for this item
      meta - Consumer to manipulate meta

  • Method Details

    • name

      public ItemBuilder name(@NotNull @NotNull String name)
      Set the name of this item

      Will accept color codes

      Parameters:
      name - Name to set
      Returns:
      This ItemBuilder

    • addLore

      public ItemBuilder addLore(@NotNull @NotNull String lore)
      Add lore to this item

      Will stack onto previous lore. Will accept color codes

      Parameters:
      lore - Lore to add
      Returns:
      This ItemBuilder

    • lore

      public ItemBuilder lore(@NotNull @NotNull List<String> lores)
      Set the lore of this item

      This will wipe any previous lore, will not accept color codes.
      You will need to manage colors yourself, consider using Util.getColString(String)

      Parameters:
      lores - List of lore to add
      Returns:
      This ItemBuilder

    • addEnchant

      public ItemBuilder addEnchant(@NotNull @NotNull Enchantment enchantment, int level)
      Add an enchantment to this item
      Parameters:
      enchantment - Enchantment to add
      level - Level of enchantment to add
      Returns:
      This ItemBuilder
